{"type":"mermaid","mermaid":"graph LR entity["Meadow Entity
Book"] --> endpoints["Meadow-Endpoints"] endpoints --> r1["GET /Books -> Reads"] endpoints --> r2["GET /Books/Count -> Count"] endpoints --> r3["GET /Book/:id -> Read"] endpoints --> r4["GET /Book/Schema -> Schema"] endpoints --> r5["POST /Book -> Create"] endpoints --> r6["PUT /Book -> Update"] endpoints --> r7["DEL /Book/:id -> Delete"] endpoints --> r8["DEL /Book/Undelete/:id"] entity --> hooks["Behavior injection hooks
Dynamic filtering and pagination
Bulk operations"] ","style":"notebook","emphasis":[{"node":"endpoints","accent":true,"bold":true}]}
